_comment: Synced MCP servers — secret-free entries only. install.sh merges this into ~/.config/github-copilot/mcp.json on install (shared wins on key collision); the existing pipeline then imports the merged set into ~/.claude.json so Claude Code sees it too. Per-machine secret-bearing entries (PATs, API keys) live ONLY in the gitignored ~/.config/github-copilot/mcp.json and are preserved by the merge.

_github_template._note: GitHub's hosted MCP requires Bearer-PAT auth (no OAuth/DCR support). Add a copy of this entry to your gitignored ~/.config/github-copilot/mcp.json, replacing YOUR_GITHUB_PAT with a token from https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new. Do NOT add it here — that would commit the secret.
